stories.headline: DHS agent killed US citizen in March last year, records reveal
stories.description: Texas shooting appears to be the first known instance of US citizen being killed during Trump’s immigration crackdown.

stories.headline: Modi’s Israel visit: Timeline of India’s relations with Israel, Palestine
stories.description: From Mahatma Gandhi’s support for Palestine to Modi’s Netanyahu embrace, how India’s ties have evolved over the decades.

stories.headline: Is there really a 'quiet revival' of religion among Gen Z?
stories.description: A fierce debate is taking place about whether there really has been a revival in Christianity.

stories.headline: Attacked in India, Kashmiri shawl sellers choose between safety, livelihood
stories.description: A surge in attacks has forced many Kashmiris to return home. Others are devising survival strategies.

stories.headline: Iran will not bow down to US pressure in nuclear talks, Pezeshkian says
stories.description: Iranian president vows to stand firm as Trump threatens strikes and the US bolsters its military presence in the Gulf.
